auth.demoNote: Demo version connected to a live backend
auth.demoInfo: All demo roles use test accounts with password `demo1234`.

intakeMethod.label: Intake method
intakeMethod.courierPickupDesc: A courier will collect the parcel from the sender's address and pass it into the network.
intakeMethod.pointDropoffDesc: Print a label and hand the parcel over at your chosen drop-off point.

deliveryType.label: Delivery method
deliveryType.courierDesc: The final leg is handled by a courier who delivers to the recipient's address.
deliveryType.pickupPointDesc: The parcel is sent to a pickup point and the recipient collects it themselves.

sender.label: Sender
sender.name: Full name
sender.dropoffPoint: Drop-off location — where you'll hand over the parcel

recipient.label: Recipient
recipient.name: Full name
recipient.pickupPointNote: You'll select the pickup point in the next step.

parcel.title: Parcel
parcel.pickupPoint: Pickup location — where the recipient will collect the parcel

payment.title: Payment
payment.subtitle: Choose a payment channel matching your delivery type.
payment.onlineDesc: Pay immediately via Stripe — no extra steps at drop-off.
payment.atPointDesc: Pay in cash or by card when you hand the parcel over at the point.
payment.atCourierDesc: The courier will collect payment on delivery — cash or card.

confirm.title: Shipment created
confirm.noteAtPoint: Bring the parcel to the selected point — the operator will confirm payment on acceptance.
confirm.noteAtCourier: The courier will collect payment on delivery. The shipment is ready for posting.
confirm.noteOnline: You can pay for the shipment via Stripe now, or later from the shipment details page.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: It looks like this address doesn't exist or has been moved.

stripeSuccess.title: Payment confirmation
stripeSuccess.successDesc: Your payment has been accepted. The shipment status will be updated shortly.

shipmentDetails.title: Shipment details
shipmentDetails.notFoundDesc: The selected shipment does not exist or is not available.
shipmentDetails.paymentSuccess: Payment completed successfully. Status will be updated shortly.
shipmentDetails.paymentCancelled: Payment was cancelled or declined. You can try again.
shipmentDetails.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this shipment? This cannot be undone.
shipmentDetails.noHistory: This shipment has no tracking events yet.
shipmentDetails.problemDesc: Claims are already connected to the live backend.
shipmentDetails.payError: Failed to initiate payment. Please try again.
shipmentDetails.cancelError: Failed to cancel shipment. Please try again.

clientDashboard.title: Client dashboard
clientDashboard.subtitle: Check the current status of your shipments and manage your orders.
clientDashboard.ctaDesc: Fill in the form, choose a delivery method and pay online or at drop-off.

clientClaims.title: Claims
clientClaims.empty: This client has no claims yet.
clientClaims.noSubject: No separate subject in the current client contract.
clientClaims.subjectRequired: Enter a subject for the claim.
clientClaims.descPlaceholder: Describe the issue with your shipment
clientClaims.descRequired: Enter a description for the claim.
clientClaims.descMinLength: Description should be at least 10 characters.

courierDashboard.title: Courier dashboard
courierDashboard.subtitle: Here you'll find all assigned delivery tasks for today and upcoming days.
courierDashboard.empty: No active tasks for this courier.

pointDashboard.title: Point dashboard
pointDashboard.walkInDesc: Register a shipment from a walk-in client — no account, cash payment.
pointDashboard.searchDesc: Enter a tracking number to go directly to the correct operational queue.
pointDashboard.notInQueue: Shipment {{code}} is not currently in any queue at this point.
pointDashboard.toolsDesc: Quick report for the entire point queue and CSV export for work outside the UI.

redirect.title: Shipment redirect
redirect.heading: Redirect shipment {{id}}
redirect.description: Select a new pickup point to which your shipment should be redirected.

tracking.title: Track shipment
tracking.notFound: No shipment found with the given tracking number.
tracking.loadError: Failed to load shipment history. Please try again.
tracking.noEvents: No tracking events for this shipment.

points.title: Pickup points and parcel lockers
points.searchPlaceholder: Search by city, address or point code
points.noResults: No points found matching the given filters.

hero.title: Fast and reliable delivery
hero.subtitle: A modern logistics system for your business and personal needs

features.title: Why PingwinPost?
features.fastDesc: Delivery from the next business day. Monitor your shipment in real time.
features.secureDesc: Your shipments are insured. Full control and transparency.
features.networkDesc: Over 5,000 pickup points and parcel lockers across Poland. Always close to you.

cta.title: Ready to ship?
cta.subtitle: Create an account and send your first shipment today. Simple process, low prices.

footer.tagline: Modern logistics company. Fast, secure, reliable.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Transparent pricing for individual and business customers.
pricing.b3: Online and in-point payment available for selected services.

about.title: About us
about.description: PingwinPost is a modern logistics system with roles for client, courier, pickup point, and administrator.
about.b1: Frontend built as a thin client in React + TypeScript.
about.b2: Mockups and dashboards cover the main user roles.
about.b3: The system is being developed towards full logistics process coverage.

careers.title: Careers
careers.description: Join the team developing modern logistics services.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Contact our customer service team or central office.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: Frequently asked questions in one simple section.
faq.b1: How do I track a shipment? Use the tracking number on the tracking page.
faq.b2: How do I file a claim? From the client dashboard.
faq.b3: How do I collect a parcel? At a pickup point or parcel locker.

terms.title: Terms
terms.description: The most important terms for using PingwinPost services in brief.
terms.b1: Conditions for sending and receiving shipments.
terms.b2: Rules for online and offline payments.
terms.b3: Basic information on claims and returns.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: We care about security and transparency in processing user data.
privacy.b1: User data is used for shipment handling.
privacy.b2: Shipment statuses and history are visible after logging in.
privacy.b3: Only authorised system users have access to data.

adminDashboard.panelDesc: Based on the current operational model and allows performing the most important actions without navigating to separate screens.
adminDashboard.focusReadyDesc: Paid shipments waiting to be prepared for dispatch.
adminDashboard.focusCourierDesc: Shipments ready for dispatch but without a courier task.
adminDashboard.focusPaymentDesc: COD deliveries where the courier must collect cash or card at the door.
adminDashboard.focusRedirectDesc: Shipments after a failed delivery attempt, not yet accepted at the pickup point.
adminDashboard.focusPickupDesc: Shipments waiting for the client in the pickup flow.
adminDashboard.errorLoad: Failed to refresh the operations panel.
adminDashboard.demoDesc: Hidden operational pages for demonstrating the shipment lifecycle, hub transit, and technical intake/release flows. Linked only from the admin layer.
adminDashboard.prepareQueueDesc: Paid shipments ready for their first operational move.
adminDashboard.prepareEmpty: No shipments waiting to be prepared for dispatch.
adminDashboard.dispatchQueueDesc: Shipments that can be assigned to a courier without going into the raw API.
adminDashboard.dispatchEmpty: No shipments waiting for courier assignment.
adminDashboard.reassignQueueDesc: Tasks not yet started that can be quickly reassigned to another courier without going into a separate flow.
adminDashboard.reassignEmpty: No tasks waiting for manual courier reassignment.
adminDashboard.checkoutQueueDesc: Shipments with OFFLINE_AT_COURIER where delivery is already with the courier but cash or card collection must be closed before final delivery.
adminDashboard.checkoutRowPayment: Payment: {{status}} | Suggested action: collect payment and deliver
adminDashboard.checkoutMonitorNote: Monitoring only: this settlement is closed by the courier in task details. On the board, watch for shipments stuck too long before DELIVERED.
adminDashboard.paymentExceptionsDesc: Payments closest to requiring confirmation or a manual decision.
adminDashboard.paymentDecisionNeeded: Requires client decision or further analysis.
adminDashboard.complaintQueueSectionDesc: Claims that can be acted on directly from the panel.
adminDashboard.complaintEmpty: No claims in the review queue.
adminDashboard.fleetDesc: Courier load summary based on the current seed and live operations.

courierTasks.title: Delivery tasks
courierTasks.activeTasksDesc: Manage tasks — accept routes, confirm deliveries and record failed attempts.
courierTasks.searchPlaceholder: Enter tracking number, recipient name or part of address
courierTasks.batchSelected: Selected {{selected}} of {{total}} active tasks in current view.
courierTasks.batchNote: Batch mode works on the current filter and skips closed tasks (FAILED, COMPLETED).
courierTasks.paymentWarning: {{count}} selected tasks require payment collection — handle via task details.
courierTasks.emptyDesc: You have no delivery tasks right now. If you expect work — contact the dispatcher.
courierTasks.noMatch: No tasks matching the selected filter or search query. Change filter or clear search.
courierTasks.pickupNetworkNote: After pickup confirmation the parcel will go to the sorting hub.
courierTasks.collectionPickup: At the pickup stage the courier does not collect payment yet.
courierTasks.collectionRequired: The courier must collect payment on delivery.
courierTasks.nextStepAssigned: Accept the task to confirm readiness for the route.
courierTasks.nextStepAccepted: Start the route when departure is actually ready.
courierTasks.nextStepInProgress: Complete delivery successfully or record a failed attempt with redirect.
courierTasks.nextStepInProgressPayment: Before completing delivery the courier must collect payment — cash or card.
courierTasks.nextStepFailed: Task is after a failed attempt. Further handoff is handled by the point or operations.
courierTasks.nextStepDone: Task is completed and requires no further courier action.
courierTasks.nextStepPickupAssigned: Accept the task to confirm readiness to pick up the parcel from the sender.
courierTasks.nextStepPickupAccepted: Start the route when you are ready to pick up from the sender.
courierTasks.nextStepPickupInProgress: Confirm pickup from the sender to pass the parcel into the network.
courierTasks.nextStepPickupFailed: Pickup was not completed. Operational decision or reassignment required.

courierTaskDetails.title: Task details
courierTaskDetails.heading: Courier task details
courierTaskDetails.desc: This view combines task data, recipient info and tracking so the courier doesn't need to switch screens.
courierTaskDetails.notFound: Task not found for the given identifier.
courierTaskDetails.collectionPickupNote: No — payment is not collected during sender pickup.
courierTaskDetails.collectionYes: Yes — courier must collect payment on delivery.
courierTaskDetails.noHistory: No tracking history for this shipment.
courierTaskDetails.pickupNetworkNote: After pickup confirmation the parcel will be passed into the network and go to the sorting hub.
courierTaskDetails.noticeUnavailable: Notice is only available after the shipment is redirected to a pickup point.
courierTaskDetails.confirmReturn: Initiate return to sender? This cannot be undone.
courierTaskDetails.returnInProgress: Return of this shipment is already in progress or completed.
courierTaskDetails.failedPickupNote: Pickup from sender was not completed. Further decision is for the dispatcher or operations.
courierTaskDetails.completedNote: This task has no more active courier actions. Status is completed or requires dispatch-side operations.

actionPlan.pickupAssignedDesc: Dispatcher assigned a courier for pickup from the sender, but the courier has not yet confirmed the task.
actionPlan.pickupAssignedBullet1: After acceptance, start the pickup when you are ready to depart.
actionPlan.pickupAcceptedDesc: The pickup task is already on the courier's side and is waiting for departure to the sender.
actionPlan.pickupAcceptedBullet1: After starting, the task moves into active sender pickup.
actionPlan.pickupInProgressDesc: The courier is on the way to the parcel and should confirm pickup to introduce the shipment into the network.
actionPlan.pickupInProgressBullet0: Pick up the parcel from the sender.
actionPlan.pickupInProgressBullet1: After confirmation the parcel will go to the sorting hub.
actionPlan.pickupFailedDesc: This scenario requires further operational decision or reassignment.
actionPlan.pickupFailedBullet1: If needed, ask the dispatcher for reassignment.
actionPlan.assignedDesc: Dispatcher assigned the task, but the courier has not yet confirmed acceptance of route responsibility.
actionPlan.assignedBullet1: After acceptance, start the route when you are ready to depart.
actionPlan.acceptedDesc: The task is on the courier's side and is waiting for departure in the route flow.
actionPlan.acceptedBullet1: After starting, the shipment moves into the live delivery flow.
actionPlan.inProgressPaymentDesc: Before completing the task the courier must collect payment and indicate whether it was cash or card.
actionPlan.inProgressPaymentBullet1: Only then complete the delivery successfully.
actionPlan.inProgressDesc: At this stage the courier should complete delivery successfully or record a failed attempt with redirect.
actionPlan.inProgressBullet0: Deliver the shipment if the recipient is available.
actionPlan.inProgressBullet1: If not, record the attempt and indicate a pickup point.
actionPlan.failedDesc: Courier attempt was recorded. Further step is already in the pickup/point flow.
actionPlan.failedBullet0: Check tracking if you want to confirm redirect.
actionPlan.failedBullet1: The pickup point handles the next handoff.
actionPlan.completedDesc: This task requires no more courier action.
actionPlan.completedBullet0: You can move on to the next task from the list.
actionPlan.completedBullet1: Tracking is already closed on the operational side.

shipmentGuidance.paymentPendingCurrent: Your shipment has been created and is waiting for online payment confirmation.
shipmentGuidance.paymentPendingAction: Pay for the shipment, then print the label and attach it to the parcel.
shipmentGuidance.paymentPendingNext: After payment, the parcel can be handed over to a point or prepared for courier pickup.
shipmentGuidance.handoverPointCurrent: The parcel is ready to be handed over to the network through a point.
shipmentGuidance.handoverPointActionOffline: Print the label, attach it to the parcel, take it to {{point}} and pay at drop-off.
shipmentGuidance.handoverPointActionCancel: Print the label, attach it to the parcel and take it to {{point}}. You can still cancel the shipment before it is posted onward.
shipmentGuidance.handoverPointAction: Print the label, attach it to the parcel and take it to {{point}}.
shipmentGuidance.handoverPointNext: After point intake, the parcel will be posted onward and sent to the sorting hub.
shipmentGuidance.handoverCourierAssignedCurrent: A pickup courier has already been assigned to collect your parcel from the sender address.
shipmentGuidance.handoverCourierAssignedAction: Keep the parcel packed, labeled and ready for handover to the courier.
shipmentGuidance.handoverCourierAssignedNext: The assigned courier{{id}} will confirm pickup and hand the parcel into the network.
shipmentGuidance.handoverCourierCurrent: The parcel is waiting to be handed over to the network by courier pickup.
shipmentGuidance.handoverCourierAction: Print the label, attach it to the parcel and keep it ready for pickup.
shipmentGuidance.handoverCourierNext: Once pickup is confirmed, the parcel will go to the sorting hub.
shipmentGuidance.acceptedAtSourceCurrent: The point has already accepted your parcel.
shipmentGuidance.acceptedAtSourceAction: No action is needed from you right now.
shipmentGuidance.acceptedAtSourceNext: The parcel will be posted onward and moved to the sorting hub.
shipmentGuidance.inTransitCurrent: Your parcel is moving through the sorting network.
shipmentGuidance.inTransitAction: No action is needed from you right now.
shipmentGuidance.inTransitNext: Next it will arrive in the destination city for final delivery or pickup.
shipmentGuidance.atDestinationHubCurrent: The parcel has reached the destination city hub.
shipmentGuidance.atDestinationHubAction: No action is needed from you right now.
shipmentGuidance.atDestinationHubNextPoint: Next it will be routed to pickup point {{point}}.
shipmentGuidance.atDestinationHubNextCourier: Next a courier will be assigned for final delivery.
shipmentGuidance.outForDeliveryCurrent: A courier has your parcel and is on the delivery route.
shipmentGuidance.outForDeliveryActionPayment: Be ready for courier delivery. Payment will be collected on delivery.
shipmentGuidance.outForDeliveryNext: If delivery succeeds, the shipment will be marked as delivered.
shipmentGuidance.inTransitToPointCurrent: The parcel is on its way to the pickup point.
shipmentGuidance.inTransitToPointAction: No action is needed yet. Wait until the point confirms receipt.
shipmentGuidance.inTransitToPointNext: After intake at {{point}}, the parcel will wait there for pickup.
shipmentGuidance.awaitingLockerCurrent: The parcel is waiting in the locker for pickup.
shipmentGuidance.awaitingPickupCurrent: The parcel is waiting at the pickup point.
shipmentGuidance.awaitingLockerAction: Go to the locker and collect the parcel.
shipmentGuidance.awaitingPickupAction: Go to {{point}} and collect the parcel.
shipmentGuidance.awaitingNext: After pickup, the shipment will be marked as delivered.
shipmentGuidance.failedAttemptCurrent: The delivery attempt failed and the parcel is being redirected.
shipmentGuidance.failedAttemptAction: Wait for confirmation that the parcel is ready at a pickup point.
shipmentGuidance.failedAttemptNext: Once the point accepts it, you will be able to collect it there.
shipmentGuidance.deliveredCurrent: The shipment has been delivered successfully.
shipmentGuidance.deliveredAction: No action is needed from you.
shipmentGuidance.canceledNext: The parcel will not continue in the network.
shipmentGuidance.defaultAction: Check the latest status and wait for the next update.
shipmentGuidance.defaultNext: The next operational step will appear after the network updates this shipment.

adminShipments.explainDefault: Check shipment details and decide the next operational move.
adminShipments.heading: Shipment board
adminShipments.desc: Shipment list with guidance on who should make the next move and which action is most urgent right now.
adminShipments.searchPlaceholder: Search by tracking, city or courier
adminShipments.courierCollectionBadge: Cash or card payment at delivery
adminShipments.courierMonitorNote: This quick action is on the courier side.
adminShipments.courierMonitorDetail: Monitor task details and confirm the payment closes before delivery.
adminShipments.pickupCourierNote: This is the next step for the courier picking up the parcel from the sender.
adminShipments.pointActionNote: Quick action requires an assigned point operator
adminShipments.pointActionNoteAdmin: Quick action requires an assigned point operator.
adminShipments.statPrepareDesc: Payment confirmed but shipment not yet in the network or waiting for the first handoff.
adminShipments.statAssignDesc: Dispatcher has the most impact on keeping this queue moving.
adminShipments.statCourierCheckoutDesc: Door payment that the courier must close before marking as delivered.
adminShipments.statPointDesc: Redirects and pickups requiring a response from the pickup point.
adminShipments.statBlockedDesc: Shipments with a blocked reason that usually need a manual look.

action.COMPLETE_PICKUP_FROM_SENDER: Courier should confirm pickup from sender

explain.PREPARE_FOR_DISPATCH: Operations should move the shipment from payment into first handover.
explain.ASSIGN_PICKUP_COURIER: Dispatcher should assign a courier to pick up the parcel from the sender.
explain.ACCEPT_PICKUP_TASK: Courier already has a pickup assigned but has not yet confirmed acceptance.
explain.START_PICKUP_ROUTE: Courier confirmed the pickup task but has not yet departed to collect the parcel.
explain.COMPLETE_PICKUP_FROM_SENDER: Courier should confirm pickup from the sender and introduce the shipment into the network.
explain.POST_FROM_SOURCE: The point has already accepted the shipment and only needs to confirm onward posting.
explain.ASSIGN_COURIER: Dispatcher should assign a courier so the shipment leaves the waiting queue.
explain.HAND_OVER_TO_COURIER: Next move is on the courier or point side handing the shipment over for delivery.
explain.ROUTE_TO_PICKUP_POINT: Hub should send the shipment to the target point so it can be accepted and released.
explain.ACCEPT_TASK: Task exists but the courier has not yet confirmed acceptance.
explain.START_ROUTE: Task is accepted but the courier has not yet started the route.
explain.COMPLETE_OR_RECORD_ATTEMPT: The shipment is already in delivery and needs a final outcome from the courier.
explain.COLLECT_PAYMENT_AND_DELIVER: Courier must close payment on delivery before marking the shipment as delivered.
explain.ACCEPT_REDIRECTED_SHIPMENT: Point should accept the redirect so the shipment enters client pickup flow.
explain.PICKUP_AT_POINT: Client can collect the shipment and the point should manage the release flow.
explain.REVIEW_EXCEPTION: Shipment is stuck in a state requiring manual analysis or operational decision.
explain.NONE: No suggested quick action at this stage.

adminPayments.hintPending: Awaiting final online confirmation or manual decision from the finance team.
adminPayments.hintFailed: Payment failed and requires a decision: client retry or cancellation.
adminPayments.hintOfflinePoint: Point should close payment on release or in a separate finance step.
adminPayments.hintOfflineCourier: Courier must collect cash or card payment before closing the delivery task.
adminPayments.hintOfflineConfirmed: Offline payment is closed. Worth checking collection method and final shipment status.
adminPayments.hintDefault: Payment requires no active operational intervention right now.
adminPayments.heading: Finance and offline payments
adminPayments.desc: This view separates online payments, point settlements and courier settlements so it's immediately clear who needs to close each step.
adminPayments.statFinanceDesc: Online payments pending or failed — requires manual decision.
adminPayments.statPointDesc: Offline payments pending that should be settled at the point.
adminPayments.statCourierDesc: Cash or card collection to be closed at delivery.
adminPayments.statConfirmedDesc: Closed settlements with collection method — ready for audit.
adminPayments.searchPlaceholder: Search by tracking number, client or reference
adminPayments.financeQueueDesc: Online payments that require a manual decision from finance or admin.
adminPayments.pointQueueDesc: Offline pending payments that should be settled at the point on release.
adminPayments.courierQueueDesc: Cash or card payments pending — must be closed by the courier before delivery.
adminPayments.archiveDesc: Confirmed offline, paid or cancelled payments for quick audit of collection method and final shipment status.
adminPayments.monitoringOnlyPoint: Monitoring only: quick action stays in point/payment-verification or admin/shipments.
adminPayments.monitoringOnlyCourier: Monitoring only: collection method will appear after the courier properly closes the payment.
adminPayments.emptyPoint: No point payment cases after filters.
adminPayments.emptyCourier: No courier payment cases after filters.

adminUsers.heading: User directory
adminUsers.desc: Manage accounts, roles and assignment of people to courier cities and pickup points.
adminUsers.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, city or pointCode

clientShipments.heading: All shipments
clientShipments.desc: Shipment list linked to the logged-in client with quick actions without going to details.
clientShipments.searchPlaceholder: Enter tracking number, recipient name or destination city
clientShipments.empty: No shipments for this filter or client account.
clientShipments.errorPaymentInvalid: This shipment no longer has an active online payment to initiate.
clientShipments.printEyebrow: Quick client print from shipment list

pointPaymentVerification.heading: Offline payment confirmation
pointPaymentVerification.desc: Screen for point {{code}} — separates the finance step from the release, but also provides a quick checkout for demo use.
pointPaymentVerification.modesDesc: 'Confirm payment' closes the finance step. 'Collect payment and release' provides a quick flow for demo and simple point checkouts.
pointPaymentVerification.financeOnlyHint: Use when the shipment is not yet ready for immediate release to the client.
pointPaymentVerification.checkoutHint: Records that can be closed at the window right after payment.
pointPaymentVerification.financeSectionDesc: Records that need to be settled but are not yet ready for immediate release to the client.
pointPaymentVerification.financePrintSubtitle: Currently visible records requiring only offline payment confirmation.
pointPaymentVerification.financeBatchPrintSubtitle: Batch report for records selected for payment confirmation only.
pointPaymentVerification.financeEmpty: No offline payments pending confirmation only.
pointPaymentVerification.financeNote: Safer to close the finance step first and handle the release separately after the next handoff.
pointPaymentVerification.printDocSubtitle: Auxiliary printout for confirming settlement at the point and handling checkout.
pointPaymentVerification.checkoutSectionDesc: Point can bulk-confirm payments or immediately close the checkout at the window.
pointPaymentVerification.checkoutPrintSubtitle: Currently visible records ready for quick checkout and release.
pointPaymentVerification.checkoutBatchPrintSubtitle: Batch report for records selected for quick checkout and release.
pointPaymentVerification.checkoutNote: This record looks ready for quick checkout at the window.

pointShipments.heading: Queue overview
pointShipments.desc: Here you see all active queues for point {{code}}. Choose the right section depending on what the client or parcel needs right now.
pointShipments.acceptDesc: New intakes, redirects, and items ready to post onward.
pointShipments.acceptEmpty: No items in the intake queue.
pointShipments.releaseDesc: Parcels waiting for the client at the point.
pointShipments.offlinePayDesc: Cash settlements and quick checkouts for the point.
pointShipments.showingMore: Showing 3 of {{count}} items. Full processing is on the dedicated screen.

pointRelease.heading: Release parcel to client
pointRelease.desc: Here you only work with parcels ready for pickup at point {{code}}. If a client is at the window, find their shipment and confirm the release.
pointRelease.statReadyDesc: These shipments can be released immediately. Payment no longer blocks the operator.
pointRelease.statFinanceDesc: Hold these shipments at the finance step first, then return to release to client.
pointRelease.sectionDesc: This is the final point step. Select a parcel, confirm client pickup, and close the release.
pointRelease.digestSubtitleVisible: Currently visible records in the release queue after operator filter.
pointRelease.digestSubtitleSelected: Bulk report for shipments selected for release to client.
pointRelease.noteOfflinePayment: This parcel still awaits offline settlement. Safer to process it through the payment screen first.
pointRelease.notePaymentOk: Finance does not block the release. Operator can close the pickup right away.
pointRelease.printSubtitle: Helper printout for point operator during client pickup.

pointAccept.heading: Accept and post onwards
pointAccept.desc: First physically accept the parcel to point {{code}}, then confirm posting it onwards to the network.
pointAccept.statFreshDesc: Normally paid parcels the point is just taking over.
pointAccept.statRedirectsDesc: After acceptance they go to the client pickup flow, not to further posting.
pointAccept.statReadyToPostDesc: Second handoff: shipment was accepted and awaits passing onwards.
pointAccept.step1Desc: Scan or select a shipment and press "Accept". Paid parcels move to the posting section, redirects go to client pickup.
pointAccept.section1Desc: New parcels to accept arrive here, plus redirects to move to the pickup queue.
pointAccept.digestAcceptSubtitleVisible: Currently visible records to accept after operator filter.
pointAccept.digestAcceptSubtitleSelected: Bulk report for shipments selected for acceptance.
pointAccept.followUpRedirect: After this step the shipment moves to the Release queue, as the client will pick it up at the point.
pointAccept.followUpNormal: After this step the shipment moves to the 'Accepted, ready to post' section — the next handoff.
pointAccept.printAcceptSubtitle: Operational print helper for point staff during shipment acceptance.
pointAccept.step2Desc: These parcels are already accepted. Press "Post onwards" to confirm transfer to logistics. This is a different button than in step 1 — don't mix them up!
pointAccept.section2Desc: This is a separate operational step. Shipment was already accepted and awaits posting confirmation.
pointAccept.digestPostSubtitleVisible: Currently visible records ready to post onwards.
pointAccept.digestPostSubtitleSelected: Bulk report for shipments selected to pass onwards.
pointAccept.empty2: No shipments ready to post onwards.
pointAccept.notePostOnwards: This is the operator's second move: the point confirms the shipment leaves local intake and returns to further logistics.
pointAccept.printPostSubtitle: Helper printout for an already accepted shipment ready for further transfer.

demoHelp.introBody: Think about every parcel as moving through source -> transit -> target. After the client creates and pays, the parcel is moved operationally by the point, then by hub/transit, and finally by courier or target pickup point.
demoHelp.roleClientDesc: Creates shipments, pays, prints labels, tracks progress, and may request redirect or complaint.
demoHelp.rolePointDesc: Accepts source parcels, posts them into the network, handles walk-in creation, and releases pickup parcels.
demoHelp.roleAdminDesc: Simulates hub movement, assigns couriers, and routes parcels to pickup points.
demoHelp.roleCourierDesc: Accepts tasks, starts delivery routes, completes delivery, or records failed attempts.
demoHelp.scenario0Title: Client creates, point sends, courier delivers
demoHelp.scenario0AccountHint: Use any active client account, create and pay a courier shipment.
demoHelp.scenario0NextOwner: Next owner after payment: Source point
demoHelp.scenario0Step1: Point accepts the parcel in /point/accept and posts it onward.
demoHelp.scenario0Step2: Transit or hub accepts the parcel in /admin/demo/transit.
demoHelp.scenario0Step3: Admin or dispatcher assigns a courier in /admin/shipments.
demoHelp.scenario0Step4: Courier accepts, starts, and completes the task in /courier/tasks.
demoHelp.scenario1AccountHint: Use a client account and choose pickup-point delivery.
demoHelp.scenario1NextOwner: Next owner after destination hub: Target point
demoHelp.scenario1Step0: Client creates and pays a pickup-point shipment.
demoHelp.scenario1Step1: Source point accepts and posts it onward.
demoHelp.scenario1Step3: Admin routes it to the pickup point instead of assigning a courier.
demoHelp.scenario1Step4: Point accepts it for pickup and releases it to the recipient.
demoHelp.scenario2AccountHint: Use a point operator account and open /point/walk-in.
demoHelp.scenario2NextOwner: Next owner after walk-in creation: Same source point
demoHelp.scenario2Step0: Point creates a shipment for an existing or new client.
demoHelp.scenario2Step1: After success, move directly into the point intake/post flow.
demoHelp.scenario2Step2: From there the parcel follows the same source -> transit -> target path.
demoHelp.scenario3Title: Courier failed attempt -> redirect to pickup point
demoHelp.scenario3AccountHint: Use a courier account with an active delivery task.
demoHelp.scenario3NextOwner: Next owner after failed attempt: Admin / hub, then target point
demoHelp.scenario3Step0: Courier records a failed attempt and chooses redirect to pickup point.
demoHelp.scenario3Step1: Admin routes the parcel back toward the target point.
demoHelp.scenario3Step2: Point accepts the redirected parcel and releases it to the recipient.
demoHelp.glossaryReadyForHandover: Paid and waiting for first physical handover.
demoHelp.glossaryAcceptedAtSource: Source point already has the parcel.
demoHelp.glossaryPosted: Posted onward from the source into the network.
demoHelp.glossaryAwaitingPickup: Ready to be released at the target point.

adminPoints.heading: Point operations view
adminPoints.desc: Combines the point catalog, assigned operators, and live queue load for a quick readiness assessment.
adminPoints.empty: No points match the current filter.
adminPoints.errorToggle: Failed to change point active status.
adminPoints.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, point code, city or operator

loginDemo.tagline: Quick presenter login with existing role accounts from the live backend.
loginDemo.chooseRoleDesc: Select a role first, then choose one of the active accounts available for that role.
loginDemo.hintClient: Create, pay, track, and manage complaints.
loginDemo.hintCourier: Last-mile tasks, starts, deliveries, and failed attempts.
loginDemo.hintPoint: Point intake, release, and walk-in shipment handling.
loginDemo.hintAdmin: Operations, payments, complaints, and demo labs.
loginDemo.hintDispatcher: Shipment board, courier assignment, and operational routing.
loginDemo.demoPasswordHint: Prefilled with the shared demo password. You can still edit it if needed.
loginDemo.hint1: Pick the role you want to present, then choose one of the live accounts returned by the backend for that role.
loginDemo.hint2: Administrator and Dispatcher are separated here on purpose, even though both ultimately log into the admin shell.
loginDemo.hint3: Use /demo-help in parallel when you want a step-by-step operational script for source -> transit -> target.
